title: Route planning with GoogleMaps
excerpt:

posts.author: simon.bence (Simon Bence)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

When I record an address for an item, Map View displays it perfectly well with Google Maps.
Our company manages a lot of addresses and we need to plan the travel between them.

Is it possible to access the route planning function within the app?

Unfortunately, such a feature is only possible in the eMaps application created by Eligeo, but it is quite complex to implement.

Are there any plans in the future to integrate Google Maps route planning functionality into the system?

Thanks in advance for your reply!

Best regards,
Bence Simon

posts.author: iva_perica (Iva P)
posts.cookedHtml: I was wondering the same thing, hopefully someone knows!

posts.author: sorensonsolutions (Sarah)
posts.cookedHtml: Bumping this up bc I need this as well! eMaps is a crappy widget that doesn’t even load for me.
